title: Dependent values from other column
excerpt:

posts.author: dchristopoulos (Dimitris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello i am facing the below problem.

I would like to choose value X in column A and only get access to limited options in column B that are allowed depending on the value X. And then in column C I also get only limited options depending on the value I chose in column B.
